title: ChatContact methods (ChatContact/get, changes, set, query, queryChanges)
description: Implement JMAP Chat ChatContact methods (type was renamed from Contact to ChatContact in current spec). ChatContact.id = nie pub_id. Auto-create ChatContact records when relay delivers messages from unknown pub_ids. Support ChatContact/set update for blocked and displayName. ChatContact/query with presence and blocked filters. ChatContact/queryChanges. Map nie's directory_list/user_joined/user_left to ChatContact.presence (online/offline). firstSeenAt/lastSeenAt from relay events. Note: serverUrl and directAddress fields are defined in JMAP-CHAT-FED companion spec, not here.
notes: displayName updates via ChatContact/set MUST pass through the existing nickname canonicalization: NFC normalization, reject bidi controls, strip zero-width chars, trim whitespace, enforce 1-32 Unicode scalar length. Same rules as set_nickname on the relay.
